clawscan_note: Uses Chrome CDP for authenticated scraping and yt-dlp/Whisper for transcription. Content processing and Markdown publishing are delegated to trans-doc-to-md and upload-markdown-to-lexiang.
pr_description:
## fetch-archive-to-lexiang

Source discovery, fetching, standardized work packages, and Lexiang archival orchestration.

**Features:**
- Authenticated article fetching with images
- YouTube download + Whisper transcription
- Podcast Show Notes + transcription
- Prepared Markdown Package handoff to trans-doc-to-md
- Deduplicated Lexiang directory and VOD orchestration
